rulings.Case Title: INTERSTATE FIRE AND CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY VS. CLEVAND WRECKING COMPANY
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, April 5, 2011, line 1, PLAINTIFF INTERSTATE FIRE AND CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. DENY WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF'S SEPARATE STATEMENT DOES NOT COMPLY WITH CRC 3.1350. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: LOBEL FINANCIAL CORP. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS. LILLIA ALFARO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Be Determined The Prevailing Party And For An Award Of Attorneys Fees And Costs And Req. For Judicial
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, April 5, 2011, line 2, DEFENDANTS LILLIA ALFARO AND GABRIELA ALFARO'S Motion To Be Determined The Prevailing Party And For An Award Of Attorneys Fees And Costs. DEFENDANTS MOTION TO BE DETERMINED THE PREVAILING PARTY IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF TO REMIT TO DEFENDANT $11,500.00 AS REASONABLE ATTORNEYS FEES (23 HOURS X $500). =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: RICHARD MILLER et al VS. PACIFIC GAS & ELECTRIC COMPANY et al

rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, April 5, 2011, line 3, PLAINTIFFS RICHARD MILLER AND TAMARA MILLER'S Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement And Compel Payment Of Shipping Expenses. rulings.Case Title: NORBERTO GAERLAN VS. NEW AMERICA MEDIA et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, April 5, 2011, line 4, DEFENDANTS ALEXANDRA CLOSE, PACIFICA NEWS SERVICE, DBA NEW AMERICA MEDIA DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER TO THE 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION (COMMINGLING OF PUBLIC FUNDS) IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THERE IS NO PRIVATE ACTION FOR A PRIVATE DEFENDANTS' COMMINGLING PUBLIC FUNDS. DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER TO THE 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION (GROSS NEGLIGENCE) IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THERE IS NO NEXUS BETWEEN DEFENDANTS' PURPORTED NEGLIGENCE USE OF FUNDS AND HARM TO PLAINTIFF BY PLAINTIFF'S OWN ADMISSION IN HIS OPPOSITION. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: CATHERINE CUSIC VS. SURVEILLANCE, PROTECTION & INVESTIGATIONS GROUP, et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel X-Defts To Comply With Pltf'S Request Fro Prodcution Of Documents, Set One
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, April 5, 2011, line 1, PLAINTIFF CATHERINE CUSIC'S Motion To Compel Cross-Defendants To Comply With Plaintiff's Request For Prodcution Of Documents, Set One. CONTINUED TO APRIL 14, 2011 ON COURT'S OWN MOTION. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: MARCIA GIUSTI et al VS. BKCM ENTERPRISES INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORAION et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, April 5, 2011, line 5, DEFENDANTS JOHN SIMONSE, MAGNATE FUND #1 LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED, MAGNATE FUND #2 LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED, MAGNATE FUND #3 LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED, 27TH STREET ASSOCIATES LLC, 20 PARKRIDGE LLC, SOUTH VAN NESS ASSOCIATES LLC, LHJS INVESTMENTS, LLC, JWS CAPITAL MANAGEMENT, INC DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER AS TO THE 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION (CONSPIRACY-FRAUD) AND 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION (CONSPIRACY-CONVERSION) IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF NEEDS TO PROVIDE SPECIFIC FACTS REGARDING THE REPRESENTATIONS AND THE PROPERTY THAT WAS CONVERTED. THERE IS NO AUTHORITY TO SUPPORT DEFENDANTS' ASSERTION THAT ALL CO-CONSPIRATORS HAVE TO BE MADE A PARTY TO A CLAIM OF CONSPIRACY. DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER TO THE 3RD AND 4TH CAUSES OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD FURTHER FACTS TO SHOW THESE DEFENDANTS HAD A FIDUCIARY DUTY TO PLAINTIFF AND THAT THIS DUTY WAS BREACHED. FURTHER, PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD FACTS THE DEFENDANTS COMMITTED WRONGS PRIOR TO PLAINTIFF'S ALLEGED INJURY TO SUPPORT A CLAIM FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF. FINALLY, DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER TO THE 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD THE CONSTRUCTIVE TRUST AS A REMEDY; NOT A CAUSE OF ACTION. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: GEORGE MACHABELI et al VS. WASHINGTON MUTUAL BANK FA A BUSINESS ENTITY et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, April 5, 2011, line 6, DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.
